app.name: Gerador3D
app.tagline: 3D avatars for RPG and VTT, from text to OBS

nav.localMode: Local app — everything runs on your PC

landing.heroTitle: Create your 3D avatar and bring it to life in real time
landing.heroSubtitle: Generate 3D models from text or an image, rig the face and body, and animate the avatar with your webcam — ready for tabletop RPG on virtual tabletops via OBS.
landing.feature1Body: Describe the character or upload a 2D image and generate a ready-to-use 3D model.
landing.feature2Body: Automatic humanoid skeleton and blendshapes for expressions and motion.
landing.feature3Body: Your camera drives the avatar in real time — expressions, blinks and speech.
landing.feature4Body: Transparent background and virtual camera to drop straight into your RPG table.
landing.howTitle: From text to stage in four steps
landing.step1: Connect your AI provider and pick the models.
landing.step2: Generate the 3D model from text or image.
landing.step3: Rig it and prepare the VRM avatar.
landing.step4: Open the Studio and stream through OBS.
landing.bringYourOwnBody: The platform is open: register your providers, choose the models you prefer, and we guide you to obtain the right credentials.

auth.resetSent: We've sent a recovery link to your email.
auth.demoNotice: Demo mode: no data is saved and authentication is simulated.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.providersSubtitle: Register your providers and choose the models. Your keys are stored only in your profile.
settings.tasksSubtitle: Choose which model from your catalog runs each step of avatar creation.
settings.noCompatibleModels: No compatible model in your catalog. Enable a provider and add models.

onboarding.title: Let's set up your platform
onboarding.subtitle: Three quick steps to start creating avatars.
onboarding.step1Body: Pick a 3D generation provider and register your API key.
onboarding.step2Body: Select the models you want to use for tasks.
onboarding.step3Body: You can now generate your first 3D model.

generate.title: Generate 3D model
generate.subtitle: Describe the character or upload an image to generate a 3D model.
generate.promptPlaceholder: e.g. an elven warrior with silver armor and a blue cape
generate.dropImage: Click to upload or drag an image (PNG/JPG)
generate.noModelForTask: No model configured for this task. Open Settings to choose a model.

library.title: My library
library.subtitle: Your generated 3D models.
library.empty: You haven't generated any models yet.

studio.title: Live Studio
studio.subtitle: Your webcam animates the avatar in real time. Capture it in OBS for your table.
studio.calibrateHint: Look at the camera with a relaxed face and click calibrate. Expressions are then measured from your rest face.
studio.cameraError: Couldn't access the camera. Check your browser permissions.
studio.obsHint: In OBS, add a Browser Source pointing to the opened URL. The background is transparent.
studio.permissionHint: Allow camera access when the browser asks.
studio.blendshapeNote: No blendshapes on your model? Click "Configure facial expressions" and mark the eyes, mouth and jaw — we synthesize mouth, smile, blink and jaw-open for any character, creatures included.

analytics.title: Usage analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track your 3D model generations.
analytics.empty: No data yet. Generate a model to see your analytics.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Aggregated platform overview.
admin.note: Platform counters are anonymous aggregates maintained by Cloud Functions. Each user's private data is never exposed.
